allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP Status: %{http_code}\\nTime: %{time_total}s\\nIP: %{remote_ip}\\n" --max-time 10 "https://stats.nba.com/stats/boxscoremiscv3?GameID=0022500001&LeagueID=00" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" -H "Referer: https://www.nba.com/" -H "Origin: https://www.nba.com" -H "x-nba-stats-origin: stats" -H "x-nba-stats-token: true")
Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_parquet\(''data/play_by_play.parquet''\); print\(f''PBP games: {df[""GAME_ID""].nunique\(\)}''\); print\(f''PBP rows: {len\(df\)}''\)")
Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_parquet\(''data/play_by_play.parquet''\); print\(''Columns:'', list\(df.columns\)[:30]\); print\(''Sample GAME_ID:'', df[''GAME_ID''].iloc[0]\)")
